aries:
♈ Aries

🔥 Energy: Unstable push-pull

💼 Career: Start strong but distractions aa jayenge

❤️ Love: Mood swings partner ko confuse karenge

💰 Money: Jaldi paisa aayega, jaldi jayega

🧘 Advice: Consistency pe kaam karo

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Tum excitement me discipline bhool jate ho
